|desc={{p|Lapras}} was a Pokémon owned by the [[Silph Co.]], which Sabrina befriended during her attempt to save the company from Team Rocket. After [[Giovanni]]'s defeat, Lapras went with Satoshi. This Lapras is [[Talking Pokémon|capable of human speech]], allowing it to communicate with people.

Lapras's known moves are {{m|Hydro Pump}}, {{m|Mist}}, and {{m|Confuse Ray}}.}}
